title: core/duty_cycle: f32 usage inconsistent with fixed-point discipline
description: In duty_cycle.rs:27-166, uses f32 for duty cycle ratios (DEFAULT_DUTY_CYCLE: f32 = 0.01). This is inconsistent with rf_health.rs which uses Q16.16 fixed-point. On soft-float embedded targets, f32 may be expensive. Consider duty_permille: u16 = 10 for 1%.
